title: Tell es-Safi/Gath I: The 1996–2005 Seasons
author: Aren M. Maeir (ed.)
allowedUseNotes: Copyrighted excavation report. Summaries in project's own words only.
summary: Primary publication of the Tell es-Safi/Gath excavations, securing the identification of the site as Philistine Gath and documenting its Iron Age extent — relevant to Achish, David's overlord, and to Philistine military capacity.
confidenceNotes: Card seeded from team knowledge; series details to verify (M1).
